name: tabnine-remote-repos-context
description: Search, explore, and investigate remote repositories using Tabnine's Context Engine

settings.name: Tabnine Host
settings.description: The hostname of your Tabnine instance (e.g., app.tabnine.com)

settings.name: Tabnine Token
settings.description: Personal access token for Tabnine authentication. Generate at https://<TABNINE_HOST> > Settings > Access Tokens.
